techs.name: Agriculture
techs.quote: 'The first seeds we planted after the Fall grew in irradiated soil. They grew anyway. Life always finds a way.' - Old Marcus

techs.name: Pottery
techs.quote: 'We dug up old jars from the ruins. Cracked and dirty, but they held water. Sometimes the simplest things keep you alive.' - Old Marcus

techs.name: Animal Husbandry
techs.quote: 'The mutated cattle were dangerous at first, but we learned to calm them. Now they pull our plows through the ash fields.' - Scout Riley

techs.name: Archery
techs.quote: 'Bullets ran out in the first year. But there were plenty of sticks and string. The old ways came back fast when raiders showed up.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Mining
techs.quote: 'The old mines collapsed in the quakes, but the ore is still down there. We just have to dig deeper and pray the tunnels hold.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Sailing
techs.quote: 'The coastlines changed after the floods, but the sea still carries us. Whoever masters the water controls what is left of this world.' - Captain Torres

techs.name: Calendar
techs.quote: 'Someone scratched tally marks on a wall for three hundred days before the marks stopped. Knowing the date matters. It means you still believe in a future.' - The Librarian

techs.name: Writing
techs.quote: 'We found a library buried under rubble. Half the books were ash. The other half? They are rebuilding civilization.' - The Librarian

techs.name: Trapping
techs.quote: 'The mutant wolves are clever, but hunger makes them predictable. Set the snare at the water hole and wait. Patience feeds the settlement.' - Scout Riley

techs.name: The Wheel
techs.quote: 'We pulled wheels off the rusted cars. Bolted them to wooden frames. Suddenly we could move supplies ten times faster. The old world left us gifts if you know where to look.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Masonry
techs.quote: 'Stone does not burn. Stone does not rot. When everything else failed us, we stacked stones and called it home.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Bronze Working
techs.quote: 'The scavengers brought back green-stained metal from the old statues. We melted it down and forged blades. Bronze is not steel, but it kills raiders just the same.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Optics
techs.quote: 'A child found a pair of binoculars in the wreckage. For the first time, we could see the raiders coming from miles away. That glass saved more lives than any weapon.' - Scout Riley

techs.name: Philosophy
techs.quote: 'Why did the old world fall? That is the first question worth asking. Until we answer it, we are doomed to build the same funeral pyre.' - Professor Hale

techs.name: Horseback Riding
techs.quote: 'The wild horses survived the fallout better than we did. Taming them again took months, but a mounted scout covers ground no walker can match.' - Scout Riley

techs.name: Mathematics
techs.quote: 'A faded math textbook from the ruins. The children groaned, but I told them: numbers built the old world, and numbers will build the next one.' - Professor Hale

techs.name: Construction
techs.quote: 'The old buildings stood for centuries. Ours need to stand for just one winter. But getting the beams right, the joints tight - that is the difference between shelter and a grave.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Iron Working
techs.quote: 'We found iron rebar in the rubble. Heated it in a makeshift forge until it glowed. The first real blade we hammered out was ugly, but it held an edge. That was the day we stopped being scavengers.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Theology
techs.quote: 'People needed something to hold onto after the Fall. Not just survival - purpose. Hope is the one resource that never runs out.' - Old Marcus

techs.name: Civil Service
techs.quote: 'Anarchy nearly killed us faster than the bombs did. The day we appointed a council and wrote down laws, that was the day we became a civilization again.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Currency
uniques: Enables conversion of city production to [Gold]
techs.quote: 'Bottle caps, bullets, salt - we tried everything as money. Turns out trade needs trust more than currency, and trust is the hardest thing to forge after the end.' - Old Marcus

techs.name: Engineering
techs.quote: 'The old engineers left behind blueprints etched in steel. We could not read them at first, but once we did, we built things that would have taken years in months.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Metal Casting
techs.quote: 'Melting down the ruins - car parts, girders, old pipes. Pouring liquid metal into sand molds. It felt like magic, but it was just chemistry we had forgotten.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Compass
techs.quote: 'A magnetized needle floating in a cup of water. That simple trick let our scouts navigate the dead zones where every landmark had been flattened.' - Captain Torres

techs.name: Education
uniques: Enables conversion of city production to [Science]
techs.quote: 'The children born after the Fall have never seen the old world. If we do not teach them what was lost, they will never know what can be rebuilt.' - Professor Hale

techs.name: Chivalry
techs.quote: 'Honor among fighters. A code that says we protect the weak, spare the surrendered. Without it, we are just another gang of raiders.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Machinery
techs.quote: 'We salvaged gears and levers from a collapsed factory. Machines that amplify human strength - that is how a hundred survivors do the work of a thousand.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Physics
techs.quote: 'Gravity, force, motion - the old laws still work. The universe did not break when we did. Understanding that gave me hope.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Steel
techs.quote: 'Steel beams from the skyscrapers. We cut them with salvaged torches and reforged them into something new. The old world's skeleton became our armor.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Astronomy
uniques: Enables [Embarked] units to enter ocean tiles
techs.quote: 'The night sky is cleaner now than it has been in centuries. No light pollution, no smog. We can read the stars again, the way the ancients did.' - Captain Torres

techs.name: Acoustics
techs.quote: 'Someone found a violin in the rubble and played it that night. People wept. We had forgotten that sound could carry beauty, not just warnings.' - Old Marcus

techs.name: Banking
techs.quote: 'We started lending seed grain on promise of future harvest. Credit, trust, debt - the bones of an economy, rising from the ashes.' - Old Marcus

techs.name: Printing Press
techs.quote: 'We carved wooden type and built a press from scrap. The first pamphlet we printed was a survival guide. The second was a constitution.' - The Librarian

techs.name: Gunpowder
techs.quote: 'The old recipe was in a chemistry book - sulfur, charcoal, saltpeter. Simple ingredients. Terrible power. We swore an oath to use it only for defense.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Navigation
techs.quote: 'Charts of the old coastlines are useless now. We sail by dead reckoning and hard-won experience. Every new island we map is a gift to those who follow.' - Captain Torres

techs.name: Economics
techs.quote: 'Scarcity and surplus, supply and demand - the old economic laws reasserted themselves before the dust had even settled. Human nature endures.' - Professor Hale

techs.name: Chemistry
techs.quote: 'Mixing compounds from scavenged chemicals. Medicines, explosives, fertilizers - chemistry is the art of transformation, and transformation is what we need most.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Metallurgy
techs.quote: 'The old foundries are tombs of rust, but the knowledge of alloys survived in textbooks. Stronger metals mean stronger tools, stronger walls, a stronger future.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Archaeology
techs.quote: 'We dig through the ruins not for treasure, but for truth. Every artifact tells us who we were - and warns us what not to become again.' - The Librarian

techs.name: Scientific Theory
techs.quote: 'Hypothesis, experiment, observation. The method survived the catastrophe. Science is not a building that can burn - it is a way of thinking.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Military Science
techs.quote: 'Courage alone will not hold a wall. Tactics, discipline, supply lines - we study the old war manuals not to glorify battle, but to survive it.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Fertilizer
techs.quote: 'The soil was poison after the Fall. But we learned to filter it, enrich it, coax life from dead ground. Feed the earth, and it feeds you back.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Rifling
techs.quote: 'Spiral grooves inside a barrel. Such a small thing, but suddenly our defenders could hit a target at three hundred yards. The raiders learned to keep their distance.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Biology
techs.quote: 'Life adapted to the new world faster than we expected. Studying how organisms survive radiation taught us more about resilience than any engineering manual.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Steam Power
techs.quote: 'We sealed a boiler from old pipes and heated it over a coal fire. When the pressure built and the piston moved, the whole settlement cheered. Power, real power, was ours again.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Dynamite
techs.quote: 'We found crates of old mining explosives in a collapsed tunnel. Handle with care, they said. Understatement of the century. But those charges cleared more rubble in a day than picks could in a month.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Electricity
techs.quote: 'The generator coughed to life at midnight. A single bulb flickered on - the first electric light in our settlement. Children who had never seen one stared like it was a star brought down to earth.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Replaceable Parts
techs.quote: 'Identical parts, interchangeable pieces. When a crossbow breaks, you swap the arm and keep fighting. Standardization is the mother of endurance.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Railroads
techs.quote: 'We cleared the old rail lines of wreckage and debris. A steam engine pulling cargo across the wasteland - settlements that once took weeks to reach are now days away.' - Captain Torres

techs.name: Refrigeration
techs.quote: 'We found a working refrigeration unit in an old truck. Keeping food cold meant it lasted weeks instead of days. Hunger stopped being a constant companion.' - Old Marcus

techs.name: Telegraph
techs.quote: 'Copper wire strung between settlements. Tap-tap-tap, a code of long and short pulses. Suddenly, a warning could travel faster than any raider on horseback.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Radio
techs.quote: 'The first broadcast crackled across the wasteland: You are not alone. Other settlements are out there. We are rebuilding. That signal changed everything.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Flight
techs.quote: 'A biplane cobbled from aluminum scraps and old engines. It barely flew, shaking like it would fall apart. But for ten minutes, we saw the world from above - and the world looked worth saving.' - Scout Riley

techs.name: Combustion
techs.quote: 'An engine that runs on liquid fuel. We siphoned gasoline from underground tanks the old world left behind. The first truck we got running could haul more than twenty pack horses.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Pharmaceuticals
techs.quote: 'We found sealed vials in a hospital basement - antibiotics, antivirals, painkillers. Then we learned to synthesize more. Medicine turned death sentences back into illnesses.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Plastics
techs.quote: 'The old world drowned in plastic. Now we melt it down and reshape it - pipes, containers, insulation. Their waste became our resource.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Electronics
techs.quote: 'Circuit boards, transistors, capacitors - tiny components that once ran the world. We are learning to read them like a lost language, one solder joint at a time.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Mass Media
techs.quote: 'Stories spread faster than truth in the wasteland. But when we harnessed that power - printing, broadcasting, sharing news - scattered survivors became a nation again.' - The Librarian

techs.name: Radar
techs.quote: 'Bouncing radio waves off objects and reading the echoes. We can see through fog, through darkness, through dust storms. Nothing sneaks up on us anymore.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Atomic Theory
techs.quote: 'The old textbooks explained what atoms are, how they split, what happens when they do. We read those pages with trembling hands, knowing this knowledge ended the world once before.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Ecology
techs.quote: 'The old world poisoned itself to death. This time, we study the land before we use it. We measure the water before we drink it. Ecology is not a luxury - it is survival.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Computers
techs.quote: 'We booted an old server from a data center. It took three days to find a compatible power supply. But when the screen lit up, we had access to millions of files - an entire civilization in a box.' - Professor Hale

techs.name: Rocketry
techs.quote: 'The fuel is volatile, the math unforgiving, and every test could be the last. But if we can put something into the sky under our own power, it means the Fall did not clip our wings forever.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Lasers
techs.quote: 'Concentrated light, focused to a point sharper than any blade. The old world used it to cut steel and read tiny discs of data. We are learning both.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Nuclear Fission
techs.quote: 'We found the old warheads. The same fire that ended the world could light it again - if we are careful. This time, we choose power over destruction.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Globalization
techs.quote: 'Radio links, trade routes, shared laws across settlements. We are weaving the scattered threads of humanity back into a single tapestry. This time, we do it right.' - Professor Hale

techs.name: Robotics
techs.quote: 'Automated arms from the old factories, rewired and reprogrammed. They never tire, never complain, never need food. But we wrote strict rules for them this time - machines serve us, never the other way around.' - The Engineer

techs.name: Satellites
techs.quote: 'We put an eye in the sky. A camera orbiting overhead, looking down at the world we broke. From up there, you can see green returning to the gray. Hope has coordinates now.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Stealth
techs.quote: 'In the wasteland, being seen means being targeted. We developed coatings, shapes, and tactics that make our scouts invisible to radar and eye alike. The unseen survive.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Advanced Ballistics
techs.quote: 'Precision-guided projectiles, calculated trajectories, explosive payloads delivered across vast distances. We wield the old world's most terrible math. May we aim more wisely than they did.' - Commander Vale

techs.name: Particle Physics
techs.quote: 'Smashing atoms to understand what holds reality together. The old world did this in enormous underground rings. We are rebuilding one, piece by painstaking piece.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Nuclear Fusion
techs.quote: 'Fission splits atoms apart. Fusion joins them together. One destroyed us. The other could power us forever - clean, limitless energy from the heart of matter itself.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Nanotechnology
techs.quote: 'Machines smaller than a cell, repairing tissue, filtering radiation from blood. The old world dreamed of this. We are building it from their unfinished notes.' - Dr. Elena Cross

techs.name: Future Tech
techs.quote: 'We have surpassed the old world. Not in power, but in wisdom. What comes next has no blueprint - we write it ourselves, on clean pages.' - Professor Hale

civilopediaText.text: Who knows what the future holds?
